questionText: Do any of your existing products and services enable clients to mitigate and/or adapt to the effects of environmental issues?
questionKo: 귀사의 기존 제품 및 서비스 중 고객이 환경 문제의 영향을 완화 및/또는 적응할 수 있도록 지원하는 것이 있습니까?
simpleHelp: Achieving a 1.5°C, deforestation-free and conversion-free, water-secure world will require massive investment in low-carbon technologies, sustainable land use, and sustainable agricultural and water management practices. Data users are interested in whether financial institutions are providing financial products and services to meet this investment challenge. This question is useful to investors seeking to increase their investment in organizations providing environmentally sustainable financial products and services.

columns.text: Existing products and services enable clients to mitigate and/or adapt to the effects of environmental issues
options: No, but we plan to address this within the next two years
No, and we do not plan to address this in the next two years
No, not applicable to our financial activities
columns.textKo: Existing products 및 서비스 enable 고객 완화 및/또는 adapt effects 의 환경이슈
optionsKo: 아니요, but 당사 plan address 이 내 next two 연도s
아니요, 당사 do 아니요t plan address 이 next two 연도s
아니요, 해당 없음 당사의 재무 활동

columns.text: Primary reason for not offering products and services that enable clients to mitigate and/or adapt to the effects of environmental issues
options: Lack of internal resources, capabilities, or expertise (e.g., due to organization size)
Judged to be unimportant or not relevant
columns.textKo: 주된 이유 아니요t offering products 및 서비스 enable 고객 완화 및/또는 adapt effects 의 환경이슈
optionsKo: 내부 자원, 역량 또는 전문성 부족(예: 조직 규모로 인해)

columns.text: Explain why your organization does not offer products and services that enable clients to mitigate and/or adapt to the effects of environmental issues
columns.textKo: 설명 why 귀사 does 아니요t offer products 및 서비스 enable 고객 완화 및/또는 adapt effects 의 환경이슈

guidance.textKo: 드롭다운 선택지 "아니요, 해당 없음 당사의 재무 활동" has added

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "Yes" in column 1 "Activity undertaken" in any row in 1.10.
guidance.textKo: - 이 문항은 선행 문항의 응답에 따라 표시 여부 또는 입력 범위가 달라질 수 있습니다. - 선행 문항의 응답을 수정하면 이 문항 또는 후속 문항의 기존 입력값이 초기화될 수 있으므로 제출 전 함께 확인하십시오.

guidance.text:
General 
Consider only financial products and services. If your organization has activities in more than one sector, you may also be presented with 7.74 and 7.74.1. All other low-carbon products and services (i.e. non-financial) should be reported in 7.74 and 7.74.1
There are various circumstances in which a financial services company might consider that the use of its products and services by others has the potential to reduce GHG emissions, deforestation and/or water insecurity
You should consider relevant low-carbon products and services such as green bonds, green loans/mortgages, green insurance products, specialty environmental risk advisory services and others.
If your organization does not offer products or services which enable clients to mitigate and/or adapt to the effects of environmental issues (e.g. if your organization only undertakes asset owner activities), select "No, not applicable to our financial activities".
Primary reason for not offering products and services that enable clients to mitigate and/or adapt to the effects of environmental issues (column 2) 
Select only one option from the drop-down menu. If multiple options reasonably apply to your company, explain any additional reasons in column 3 "Explain why your organization does not offer products and services which that enable clients to mitigate and/or adapt to the effects of environmental issues".
Explain why your organization does not offer products and services that enable clients to mitigate and/or adapt to the effects of environmental issues (column 3) 
Provide an explanation specific to your organization explaining why you do not have any existing products and services that enable clients to mitigate and/or adapt to the effects of environmental issues and outline any plans to do so in the future.
guidance.textKo: - 금융기관의 대출, 투자, 보험 인수, 자산운용 등 해당 포트폴리오 활동을 기준으로 작성하십시오. - 해당되는 자산군, 포트폴리오 범위, 적용한 방법론 또는 택소노미를 명확히 입력하십시오. - 정량값은 총 포트폴리오 가치, 보고연도, 산정 범위와 일관되게 작성하십시오. - 기타 또는 직접 입력 선택지를 사용하는 경우 명칭과 판단 근거를 구체적으로 설명하십시오.

guidance.text:
Financial services companies develop and offer products and services that enable clients to mitigate and/or adapt to the effects of climate change, deforestation, and/or water insecurity.
Financial service companies leverage sustainable finance instruments where possible. For example, they may use sustainable finance taxonomies to identify products and services they should invest in to achieve their transition plan objectives.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 해당 문항에서 우수한 응답으로 기대되는 방향을 설명합니다. 단순 선택 여부뿐 아니라 조직의 관리체계, 실행 수준, 근거자료와의 일관성을 함께 확인하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of cells displayed.
A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Column 'Existing products and services...' NOT completed - 0/8 points
A maximum of 0/8 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로) 점 부여됨 per 완료 셀 proportion 숫자 입력 의 셀 displayed. 이 경로에서 최대 3/3점을 받을 수 있습니다. 또는 비공개 경로) 열 'Existing products 및 서비스...' 아님 완료 - 0/8 점 이 경로에서 최대 0/8점을 받을 수 있습니다.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
'Yes' selected in column 'Existing products and services...' - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'No, but we plan to...' selected in column 'Existing products and services...' AND
Both columns 'Primary reason for not offering products and services …' AND 'Explain why your organization does not offer products and services...' completed - 0.5/1 points
A maximum of 0.5/1 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE C)
'No, and we do not plan to...' selected in column 'Existing products and services...' - 0/1 points
A maximum of 0/1 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE D)
‘No, not applicable to our financial activities' selected in column 'Existing products and services...' - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Column 'Existing products and services...' NOT completed - 0/4 points
A maximum of 0/4 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 인지 점수는 공시 점수 요건을 충족한 뒤, 해당 선택지 또는 조건을 만족하는 경우 부여됩니다. 배점표 기준 A 배점은 0, 0.5 또는 1/0 또는 1입니다. 비공개 경로, 미응답 셀, 필수 선택지 누락 여부에 따라 점수가 제한될 수 있으므로 위 응답방법과 D/A/M/L 배점표를 함께 확인하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
'Yes' selected in column 'Existing products and services...' - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
Either 'No, but we plan to...' OR 'No, and we do not plan to...' selected in column 'Existing products and services...' - 0/1 points
A maximum of 0/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE C)
‘No, not applicable to our financial activities' selected in column 'Existing products and services...' - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Column 'Existing products and services...' NOT completed - 0/3 points
A maximum of 0/3 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 관리 점수는 인지 점수 요건을 충족한 뒤, 관리 체계, 정량 수치, 적용 범위 또는 실행 조건을 충족하는 경우 부여됩니다. 배점표 기준 M 배점은 0 또는 1/0 또는 1입니다. 비공개 경로, 미응답 셀, 필수 선택지 누락 여부에 따라 점수가 제한될 수 있으므로 위 응답방법과 D/A/M/L 배점표를 함께 확인하십시오.

simpleHelpKo: 이 문항은 금융기관의 포트폴리오, 금융상품·서비스, 대출·투자·보험 활동이 환경 이슈와 어떻게 연결되는지 확인하는 항목입니다. 응답 시 포트폴리오 범위, 자산군, 적용 방법론, 산정 기준 및 보고연도를 명확히 작성하십시오. 문항명: 귀사의 기존 제품 및 서비스 중 고객이 환경 문제의 영향을 완화 및/또는 적응할 수 있도록 지원하는 것이 있습니까?
listTitleEn: Do any of your existing products and services enable clients to mitigate and/or adapt to the effects of environmental issues?
listTitleKo: 귀사의 기존 제품 및 서비스 중 고객이 환경 문제의 영향을 완화 및/또는 적응할 수 있도록 지원하는 것이 있습니까?
